posts.text: This is the best lede I've seen in a tech story in...years? There should be an award just for ledes.

posts.text: Continuous scroll (aka endless scroll) and autoplay next videos are some of the most devastating technologies ever invented.
posts.quote: Continuous scroll (aka endless scroll) and autoplay next videos are some of the most devastating technologies ever invented.

posts.text: Something I talk about a lot with my students regarding disinformation: an overreliance on social media that keeps you focused on a massive amount of content policed by one of the biggest monopolies in US history. And as Matt says, social media is not free; you lose your time.

RT @HexPositive: As my comrade and colleague @mattdpearce put it: 

"There is a single iron law of using the internet in 2025: You have to…
This is the best lede I've seen in a tech story in...years? There should be an award just for ledes.
Continuous scroll (aka endless scroll) and autoplay next videos are some of the most devastating technologies ever invented.
You need to pay better attention. A case for breaking away from our attentional addictions.

media-press.quote:
Matt Pearce 🦅🇺🇸 (@mattdpearce)

TAX ZUCKERBERG, FUND KICK-ASS LOCAL JOURNALISTS

TAX ZUCKERBERG, FUND KICK-ASS LOCAL JOURNALISTS 

mattdpearce.substack.com/p/c…

Something I talk about a lot with my students regarding disinformation: an overreliance on social media that keeps you focused on a massive amount of content policed by one of the biggest monopolies in US history. And as Matt says, social media is not free; you lose your time.
Information wants to be unfree. Prediction markets and the recommodification of journalism.
